name: Kid Castle Educational Corporation
summary: Kid Castle Educational Corporation operates and manages a portfolio of biopharmaceutical, agricultural, and pureplay cannabidiol (CBD) assets in the United States of America. It extracts, purchases, and distributes bulk pure CBD, isolate, hemp oil, THC-free CBD distillate, and crude CBD Oil. The company was formerly known as King Ball International Technology Corporation and changed its name to Kid Castle Educational Corporation in August 2002. Kid Castle Educational Corporation was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Torrance, California.
